title: Large Storage Bag, 2 PCS Underbed Storage Bag, 75L Heavy Duty Oxford Clothes Storage Bags 35L Moving Bag with Zips for Clothes Blankets Pillows Bedding(60x50x25cm, 50x35x20cm)

Premium Material: Large storage box is made of Oxford cloth, fine workmanship, dustproof, wear-resistantand can store quilts or clothes for a long time to keep them clean and tidy

Zipper and Handle: The large storage bag features a double zipper head design,ensuring smooth opening and closing for quick access to your items.It also comes with reinforced handles that effectively enhance load-bearing capacity,ensuring they won't break when carrying heavy items

Easy to Clean and Store: The storage bag can be hand washed or wiped clean. laundry storage bag is also collapsible for easy storage when not in use and can be stored compactly in a drawer, closet, car or luggage
Good after-Sales Service: Each of our llarge storage bag have unparalleled quality and reliable services. If you have any problems, please come to me
